name: Charter Hall Long Wale Reit
analysis: CLW has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 16% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.3× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$3.7500, stop A$3.3017, target A$5.0950 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
